calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jonathan Kahn for Petitioner.

Mr. Kahn addressed the Probate Examiner's notes stating that his Client is the Trustee of the Trust, that he brought two resignations by the named Trustees, and that his Client is the acting Trustee due to resignations and nominations. Mr. Kahn also stated that he has been representing his Client in the Trust, that all fees have been paid through the Trust, that he has not been paid anything for the Estate and that the fees are well below the statutory amount. In addition, Mr. Kahn stated he did not know the money was paid directly to the beneficiaries, that this is a close family (three siblings), that all of the siblings have signed a waiver of accountings and consents, and that they are all over 35 years of age. The First and Final Report and Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is taken under submission for Counsel to file a declaration regarding fees attaching documents showing resignation of the named Trustees.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jonathan Kahn for Jordan Moir (Petitioner).

Mr. Kahn stated that he has a copy of the Trust and that he will file it. The First and Final Report and Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to May 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Continued To Nov-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Adam Ferguson for (administrator) Jordan Moir.

The Court stated that we are here on a status and an Order to Appear, that there was no appearance on October 4, 2016 which is disturbing and that the required documents are not yet filed. Mr. Ferguson stated that there was a status set for 7/26/16 and they filed their report, that there was confusion regarding further hearings, that they filed a report yesterday and confirmed that it was not a petition. The Court stated that counsel needs to file a noticed petition allowing a report with a proposed order. Mr. Ferguson stated that he will file the petition tomorrow. The Accounting petition was continued to November 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Continued To Oct-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Jordan Moir and the Attorney Paul Pelosi to appear on October 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
